## 📝 Description

Please provide a summary of the changes and what issue or feature is addressed.

Fixes # (issue number)

## 🛠️ Changes Type

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change resolving an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change adding a capability)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature requiring API change)
- [ ] Documentation update

## 🧪 Verification & Testing

Briefly describe how you tested these changes (e.g. unit tests, integration tests, or manual PowerPoint verification).

- [ ] New tests added verify the changes.
- [ ] All 121+ tests pass successfully.
- [ ] Code formatted with `npm run format`.
- [ ] Linter passes with `npm run lint`.
